text:
Created attachment 181370
Update to 1.11.04

Update devel/p5-IO-CaptureOutput to 1.11.04 (vendor version 1.1104)
 - Specify LICENSE
 - Mark port as NO_ARCH

Changelog: http://search.cpan.org/dist/IO-CaptureOutput/Changes

Tested with 'poudriere testport' and 'make test'
portlint complains about hyphen in PORTNAME, but it is a false positive.
